calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-29-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:

Ellis Tran, for plaintiff/respondent is present;
Nico Seperas, witness, for plaintiff/respondent is also present;
Tam Ngo, employee, for defendant/appellant SF Parking, LLC, is present;
Patricia Rodriguez, owner, of SF Parking, LLC, for defendant/appellant is also present.

This case comes on calendar regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Tam Ngo testifies on behalf of SF Parking, LLC, for appellant/defendant.

Ellis Tran testifies on his own behalf for respondent/plaintiff. Witness, Nico Seperas, testifies on behalf of plaintiff/respondent.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Samuel K. Feng; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 318.
